name: udp_data_product_access_modes
description: Normalized catalog of UDP data product access patterns and transformation tiers.

products.sla: Data landed and available within 4 hours of scheduled source extract completion
products.refresh_expectation: Per source ingestion schedule or on approved backfill request

evidence_anchors.detail: Defines source-to-raw ingestion as a UDP ingress product
Describes managed ingestion and raw landing expectations

products.description: Pipeline data product that ingests records from source systems and lands them in Raw (Bronze) tables with source-aligned structure.
products.consumer_requirement: Approved source connector and platform ingestion configuration

products.sla: External feed files processed and landed within 2 hours of successful receipt
products.refresh_expectation: On file arrival according to external feed delivery schedule

evidence_anchors.detail: Defines external file feed as a Bronze ingress product
Describes file receipt and landing controls

products.description: File-based data product that receives an external source feed and lands it in Raw (Bronze) tables with source-aligned structure and landing controls.
products.consumer_requirement: Approved external feed contract, landing zone, and ingestion configuration

products.sla: Events available in Raw tables within 15 minutes of successful event receipt

evidence_anchors.detail: Defines event ingestion as a Bronze ingress product
Describes near real-time event landing expectations

products.description: Event-driven data product that ingests source events or messages and lands them in Raw (Bronze) tables with source-aligned structure and streaming controls.
products.consumer_requirement: Approved event contract, ingestion endpoint, and platform streaming configuration

products.sla: Explore surface available during business hours with platform-standard query performance
products.refresh_expectation: Aligned to underlying semantic model refresh cadence

evidence_anchors.detail: Defines self-service exploration as a UDP access product

products.description: Users drag and drop fields to build their own answer to a data question.
products.consumer_requirement: User access to approved semantic model

products.sla: Published dashboards refreshed and available by agreed reporting window
products.refresh_expectation: Scheduled dashboard refresh based on underlying dataset cadence

evidence_anchors.detail: Defines dashboards as curated UDP access products
Describes dashboard delivery surfaces and refresh expectations

products.description: Visual representation of data created to answer specific questions.

products.sla: Outbound data delivered within the agreed regulatory or partner reporting window
products.refresh_expectation: Per agreed outbound schedule, event trigger, or reporting cycle

evidence_anchors.detail: Defines managed outbound delivery as an egress product
Defines timing and packaging commitments for external delivery

products.surface: Managed outbound file or API delivery
products.description: Outbound data product that packages approved UDP data for delivery to external consumers, regulators, or partner platforms.
products.consumer_requirement: Approved outbound contract, recipient registration, and delivery control configuration

products.sla: Raw subscription datasets available after successful ingestion completion
products.refresh_expectation: Refreshed on each successful source ingestion cycle

evidence_anchors.detail: Defines Raw Bronze subscriptions and consumer project requirement
Describes access requirements for raw datasets

products.description: Data remains in source-system format with no business transformation.

products.sla: Modelled datasets refreshed within 4 hours of dependent Bronze data availability
products.refresh_expectation: Scheduled transformation cycle after upstream Raw refresh

evidence_anchors.detail: Defines Modelled Silver subscriptions as reusable transformed datasets
Describes dependency on Bronze refresh and reusable model semantics

products.description: Data transformed into reusable general-purpose models or intermediate forms.

products.sla: Focused datasets refreshed in time for agreed business or reporting commitments
products.refresh_expectation: Scheduled or event-based refresh aligned to business use case requirements

evidence_anchors.detail: Defines Focused Gold subscriptions as business-problem-specific datasets
Describes explicit business definitions and refresh alignment to use case needs

products.description: Data transformed to solve specific business problems with well-understood definitions.
